tools.name: list_calendars
tools.description: List calendars for the authenticated user.

tools.name: list_events
tools.description: List events in a calendar with optional time range and query.

tools.name: get_event
tools.description: Get a specific event by ID from a calendar.

tools.name: list_colors
tools.description: Get the color definitions for calendars and events.

tools.name: create_event
tools.description: Create an event in a calendar.

tools.name: update_event
tools.description: Update an event in a calendar (full update).

tools.name: patch_event
tools.description: Patch fields on an event in a calendar.

tools.name: delete_event
tools.description: Delete an event from a calendar.

tools.name: move_event
tools.description: Move an event to another calendar.

tools.name: quick_add
tools.description: Create an event using natural language text.

tools.name: list_acl
tools.description: List ACL rules for a calendar.

tools.name: get_acl
tools.description: Get a specific ACL rule by ID for a calendar.

tools.name: insert_acl
tools.description: Insert a new ACL rule for a calendar.

tools.name: update_acl
tools.description: Update an ACL rule for a calendar.

tools.name: delete_acl
tools.description: Delete an ACL rule from a calendar.
